# Enxo Store - Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview
Dark-themed artist merch store for Enxo built with Next.js 14, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.

## Tech Stack
- **Framework**: Next.js 14 (App Router)
- **Language**: TypeScript
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS
- **State**: React Context (Cart)

## Project Structure
- `src/app/` - App Router pages and layouts
- `src/components/` - Reusable UI components (Navbar, Hero, ProductGrid, Cart, Footer)
- `src/context/` - Cart context/state management
- `src/data/` - Product data and types
- `public/` - Static assets (images, fonts)

## Design Guidelines
- Dark background (#0a0a0a or #111111)
- White/light text for contrast
- Minimal, bold typography
- Clean product grid with hover effects
- Mobile-first responsive design
